text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the pm-certification-alignment-2026 methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: weight_tracks_eco
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Curriculum hour weighting must track 2026 ECO percentages (People 33% / Process 41% / Business 26%) ± 3pp.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `weight-tracks-eco` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: every_eco_task_mapped
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Every ECO task must map to ≥1 content unit; uncovered tasks must appear in gap plan.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `every-eco-task-mapped` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: item_bank_rebalanced
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Practice-exam item bank must be rebalanced to 2026 weights before students take mock exams.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `item-bank-rebalanced` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: business_env_emphasis
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Business Environment content must receive ≥3× pre-2026 hours given 8%→26% jump.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `business-env-emphasis` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: alignment_dated
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Alignment artefact must carry the 2026-07-01 effective date.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `alignment-dated` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-pm-certification-alignment-2026.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
